since_last: 66% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.31%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.04% · BTC -1.19% · Gold -2.25% · Nasdaq100 +2.12%. 66% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.31%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.31%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +11.69%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +11.69%, MRVL +11.06%, SMCI +9.05%, CEVA +8.83%, TLN +8.37%. Laggards: INOD -7.64%, SPCX -6.00%, IBM -5.64%, MDB -4.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.00% at $180.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
